name: FloatChat
description: Conversational interface for oceanographic data visualisation. FastAPI backend with an MCP interface for AI agents querying the ARGO Oceanographic API. Selected top 90 of 200+ college teams at SIH 2025.

name: AI Factcheck
description: Modular Python pipeline that automatically fact-checks claims using AI. Pluggable architecture for web-scraping, NLP semantic search, and LLM/NLI verification. Pydantic typing, cached embeddings, local LLMs via Ollama.

name: Hand Cricket MAB
description: Multi-armed bandit using Experts-as-Arms to beat you at Hand Cricket. Combines PyTorch neural nets, n-Gram expert models, and heuristics via the Hedge algorithm.

name: VectorBlock
description: LeechBlockNG but AI-powered. Blocks sites that don't align with your current goal — won't let you scroll Wikipedia articles on pop singers if you're meant to be studying Operating Systems.

name: Presence
description: AI-powered attendance system that uses face recognition to automatically mark students present from a single group photo taken after enrollment. DIY-Palantir.

name: Music Turing Test
description: Interactive web game: listen to short music clips and bet on whether each was made by AI or a human. Points based on accuracy and streaks.

name: Axiom Web
description: Website for Axiom, the Philosophy Society at NSUT. Built with React + Eleventy; features a newsletter, blog, and member information.

name: GDG LLM Presentation
description: Presentation on Large Language Models for GDG NSUT, with interactive HTML demos covering tokenization (BPE), attention mechanisms, and reinforcement learning. Delivered as ML Mentor.

name: pySdf
description: Python library implementing signed distance functions (SDFs) for 2D/3D geometry via NumPy — 50 2D shapes, 30 3D primitives, STL-to-SDF conversion, and Boolean composition operators. Open-source contribution.

name: Anki Toolbar Addon
description: Anki addon that rips apart the editor toolbar for finer layout control. ~150 lines; the challenge was navigating Anki's large internal codebase to make a meaningful dent.
